title: Scope configuration
description: Project-level declaration of available scopes for behavioral specs. Optional file — when absent, only the implicit 'generic' scope is available.

scopes.description: Declared scopes beyond the implicit 'generic'. Order is not significant.

id.description: Unique scope identifier. Must be lowercase, starting with a letter, containing only letters/digits/hyphens. Doubles as the directory name under .agent/specs/.

label.description: Human-readable description of what the scope represents (e.g., 'Astro VLT integration (AK2API 1.8.x)'). Displayed in CLI output and error messages. Optional — defaults to id.

default_active_scope.description: Team-level default active scope used when no user override (.agent/local/active-scope) is present. Must be either 'generic' or an id declared in 'scopes'. Null/omitted means 'generic' is the fallback.
